slides.title: Tight loops, real users.
slides.left_body: Every engagement starts with a single sharp question and ends with a system the team can run. No long discoveries, no abstract slides; live software in week one.
slides.right_body: We measure success by what gets shipped, not what gets specified. The team you meet on day one is the team that codes through to launch.

slides.chat_bubble: Concept refined into a testable prototype
slides.tagline: Turn ideas into testable AI concepts fast.

slides.challenge: Internal teams could not access the right knowledge fast enough across 10+ disconnected systems.
slides.solution: Agentic search layer that learns each team's intent and pulls the right answer from any source.

slides.quote: They built in three weeks what our last vendor scoped for nine months.
